rows.query: Can you post to QuickBooks?
rows.preview: No — I cannot post or write inside QuickBooks from NR2 (read-only). I can draft locally or export IIF after you say "I consent"; staff still post in QuickBooks.

rows.query: Short answer: can HAL write to SoftDent?
rows.preview: No. HAL cannot modify SoftDent, fee schedules, or patient records — NR2 stays read-only; staff update SoftDent directly.

rows.query: How are SoftDent write-offs classified in QuickBooks?
rows.preview: No. HAL cannot modify SoftDent, fee schedules, or patient records — NR2 stays read-only; staff update SoftDent directly.

rows.query: Can HAL trigger payments or write checks in QuickBooks?
rows.preview: No — I cannot post or write inside QuickBooks from NR2 (read-only). I can draft locally or export IIF after you say "I consent"; staff still post in QuickBooks.

rows.query: Yes or no: can HAL submit claims to the portal?
rows.preview: No. HAL cannot submit claims to payer portals — staff upload after explicit consent and review.

rows.query: Can you email the payer without consent?
rows.preview: No — I won't email the payer without your explicit consent. I can prepare a local draft; say "I consent" when you are ready.

rows.query: Can HAL export data to external email addresses automatically?
rows.preview: No — I won't export data to external email addresses automatically without explicit consent. I can prepare local drafts; say "I consent" when staff are ready.

rows.query: Can HAL send ERA explanations to patients directly?
rows.preview: No — I won't send era explanations to patients directly without explicit consent. I can prepare local drafts; say "I consent" when staff are ready.

rows.query: Is HAL certified for HIPAA compliance?

rows.query: Is payer submission allowed from NR2?
rows.preview: No. Payer submission is not allowed from NR2 — HAL prepares packets locally; staff transmit outside the program after consent.
